element_introduction_order.element: Avatar character creation and moral virtue system

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: combat tactics scale with party composition
plot progression gated by discovered keywords

element_introduction_order.element: Multi-layered world navigation and vertical stacking puzzles
Crown authority undermining and plot conspiracies

typical_relief_triggers: discovering safe areas to rest and manage inventory
successful NPC dialogue that advances plot
pausing for inventory, menu, or dialogue management
typical_tension_triggers: discovering moral dilemmas requiring virtue choices
navigating multi-layered dungeons with hidden dangers
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Player-driven exploration with real-time threat escalation; tension managed through dialogue discovery gates and optional crafting breaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Interactive objects and craftable items available throughout world indicate optional enrichment content
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Multi-layered world design with stacked items creating hidden vertical passages; puzzle-access areas hidden behind stacking requirements

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to mouse controls and real-time interaction mechanics; early companion recruitment enables party-scaling difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating monster infestations and plot conspiracies; multi-layered dungeon navigation introduces spatial complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminating threats to crown authority; moral virtue choices increasingly impact encounters and outcomes
notable_spikes: First real-time combat encounter (AI behavior learning curve)
Mid-game plot revelation requiring keyword discovery and backtracking

notable_level_patterns.description: Virtually all non-fixed objects can be manipulated, moved, or interacted with via drag-and-drop. Encourages player agency and experimentation.
Multi-layered world design where items must be stacked to create accessible pathways and reach restricted areas; spatial puzzle-solving integrated into navigation
Dialogue tree system requires discovering specific keywords in-game before dialogue options appear; prevents sequence-breaking and gates plot advancement
Party members controlled by AI with selectable behavior profiles; player focuses on Avatar while AI handles ally tactics; creates scaled challenge via party composition
Avatar identity as paragon of virtue creates environmental and narrative pressure; choices impact world state and encounter difficulty

sources_used: wikipedia - Ultima VII: The Black Gate gameplay systems section
